brand.name: Mom's Sushi & Poke
brand.tagline: Sushi, poke, and whatever else mom wants

diet.advisory: These items may contain raw or undercooked ingredients. Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish, or eggs may increase risk of foodborne illness, especially if you have certain medical conditions.

hero.title: What are we eating today?
hero.subtitle: Hand-rolled sushi, fried specialty rolls, and build-your-own poke bowls. Fresh Japanese-Hawaiian food, made the way mom likes it.

specials.title: Specialty rolls
specials.subtitle: A few of the ones people order on repeat.

poke.title: Build your own bowl
poke.subtitle: Pick a size and base, choose your protein and sauce, then load it up with toppings.

story.title: Run by mom, fed by family
story.body: Mom's started with a simple idea: serve the fresh, generous food we like to eat at home. Every roll is cut to order and every bowl is specifically built for you, so nobody leaves hungry.

visitBand.title: Come hang out at Mom's
visitBand.subtitle: Dine in or call ahead for pickup. We're on South Watson Road in Buckeye.

menu.title: Everything on the board
menu.tagline: Sushi, poke, and whatever else mom wants
menu.pokeIntro: Regular is two scoops, large is three.

about.title: A family-run spot in Buckeye
about.lead: Mom's Sushi & Poke is a family-run Japanese-Hawaiian spot in Buckeye, Arizona. We make hand-rolled sushi, fried specialty rolls, build-your-own poke, ramen, and Korean rice bowls.
about.p1: It started at the family table. The food that fed us at home, the spicy tuna, the sweet bulgogi, the bowls filled to the top, is the same food we hand across the counter now. We don't serve anything we wouldn't eat ourselves.
about.p2: Most days you'll find the same faces behind the counter and a few regulars who order the same thing every time. That suits us fine.

fresh.title: Cut fresh, every day
fresh.body: Fish is portioned to order and bowls are built in front of you. Nothing sits around.

generous.title: Big portions
generous.body: Generous scoops, loaded toppings, and sauces that actually show up. Get the large.

family.title: Family-run
family.body: Family recipes, a warm room, and the kind of welcome you'd give your own.

visit.title: Visit Mom's
visit.subtitle: Dine in or call ahead for pickup. We'd love to feed you.
visit.callBody: We take orders by phone or in person. Give us a call and we'll have it ready.

form.title: Say hello
form.subtitle: Questions, catering, or a big order coming up? Drop us a note.
form.name: Your name
form.note: This form isn't connected yet. For orders, please call the shop.

footer.madeWith: Sushi, poke, and whatever else mom wants
